evals.name: add-plugin-happy-path
evals.prompt: 내 SeamOS 프로젝트에 IMU 플러그인 추가해줘. 어떤 시그널을 쓸 수 있는지 보여주고 골라줘.
evals.expected_output: Claude triggers the edit-plugins skill, runs `inspect` to read current SSOT state, shows the plugin catalog (marking which plugins are already in use), reads `seamos-plugins/references/detail/IMU.md` to surface the IMU interface table, asks the user which interfaces and which Cyclic period(s), composes a patch JSON, runs `apply --dry-run` to show the diff and planned regen, asks about `--reset-tests`, gets explicit confirmation, then runs `apply` which chains create-project --regen-fsp-only and regen-sdk-app. Must NOT silently skip regen.

assertions.description: Invokes edit-plugins skill (not regen-sdk-app, not create-project, not seamos-plugins as a code-gen step)
Runs `edit-plugins.sh inspect` (or equivalent reading) before proposing changes, to know what's already there
Reads/quotes seamos-plugins/references/detail/IMU.md to show the interface table before asking user to pick
For an `In` (Subscribe) interface picked by the user, asks for or proposes an operation mode (Cyclic with period, or Adhoc)
Before applying, asks the user whether to also pass --reset-tests (regenerate .gen.tests/) — does not silently decide
After patch apply, runs (or instructs the script to run) BOTH create-project --regen-fsp-only AND regen-sdk-app — not just one
Never proposes or runs create-project --force-clean (would destroy user app code)

evals.name: remove-plugin-with-confirmation
evals.prompt: GPSPlugin 더 이상 안 써. 빼줘.
evals.expected_output: Claude triggers edit-plugins, inspects current SSOT, confirms with the user whether to remove ALL GPSPlugin entries or a subset, builds a remove-only patch, shows dry-run diff, asks about --reset-tests, then applies + chains regen. Must preserve the user's app code (no force-clean).

assertions.description: Asks whether to remove all GPSPlugin entries or a subset, rather than silently removing everything
Runs `apply --dry-run` and surfaces the diff to the user before mutating the SSOT
Runs both create-project --regen-fsp-only AND regen-sdk-app after the SSOT change

evals.name: missing-context-routing
evals.expected_output: USER_ROOT has no .seamos-context.json (or no last_project.name). The skill must detect this and tell the user to run create-project first — not invent defaults, not silently create a fresh interface JSON. Exit 64 from the script is correct.

assertions.description: Tells the user to run `create-project` first instead of guessing project name / building a new interface.json
Does not write or modify any -interface.json file when context is missing
